name: zinput_mouse_reset_transition_state
description: zInput::Mouse_ResetTransitionState copies the current mouse state, clears transition deltas, and recomputes accumulated cursor fields when initialized.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?Mouse_ResetTransitionState@zInput@@YAXXZ at 0x470610 still fails: 11 unmasked mismatches, 60 relocation bytes masked, 10 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 86 bytes, VC object symbol size 96 bytes.

Reviewed difference is independent load/store scheduling while copying current mouse state and clearing transition fields before the tail-call to Mouse_ApplyAccumulatedDelta. The targeted smoke directly verifies copied previous state, cleared transition fields, and resume behavior.
